vllm.title: Only emit warning about internal tokenizer if it isn't being used
vllm.author: nelson-liu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Thanks for the note about the internal tokenizer! This warning is still emitted when using it, so here's a quick PR to fix that.

vllm.title: Align vLLM's beam search implementation with HF generate
vllm.author: zhuohan123
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR refactors the changes in #646.
The goal of this PR is to align the beam search with hf_model.generate(), which is also aligned with many other older frameworks, including tensor2tensor and fairseq. When meeting a finished beam candidate, our old beam search algorithm will always keep this fi

vllm.title: Initialize AsyncLLMEngine bg loop correctly
vllm.author: Yard1

vllm.title: FIx vLLM cannot launch
vllm.author: HermitSun
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Because of a minor typo, the lastest code cannot work correctly and complains AttributeError: '_AsyncLLMEngine' object has no attribute '_process_worker_outputs'. This patch aims to fix this problem.
